title: vernonanthura stellaris
intro: Vernonanthura stellaris, also known as the star buttonbush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Vernonanthura stellaris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to make capsules, tinctures, and salves for topical application.
